In addition to the major requirements listed above, please consult the Summary of Bachelor of Science Degree Requirements (All Curricula) (https://academiccatalog.umd.edu/undergraduate/colleges-schools/ business/#collegerequirementstext) on the College Requirements section or www.rhsmith.umd.edu (http://www.rhsmith.umd.edu) for a listing of additional Smith School degree requirements that apply to all Smith School majors.
